lines.left: Use: Permanently increase the armor value of an item worn on the chest, legs, hands or feet by 32 and Stamina by 4. Only usable on items level 25 and above.
Equip: Increases your effective stealth level by 1.
Equip: Increases ranged attack speed by 13%.
Equip: Increases ranged attack speed by 13%.
Chance on hit: Corrupts the target, causing 45 damage over 3 sec.
Equip: +28 Attack Power in Cat, Bear, Dire Bear, and Moonkin forms only.
Use: Heal friendly target for 300 to 500.
Equip: Improves your chance to get a critical strike by 1%.
(3) Set: Your attacks ignore 100 of the target's armor.
Use: Hurls a fiery ball that causes 286 to 376 Fire damage and an additional 40 damage over 8 sec.

Use: Adds a companion to the player's companion collection.
"The queen had three kittens. The first gave her a juicy rat. The second, a tasty hare. And the white, her favorite, presented the head of her rival."
Use: Adds a companion to the player's companion collection.
"Known for its blue eyes. Also considered a delicacy by giant murlocs."
Use: Adds a companion to the player's companion collection.
"Old Alterac saying: 'A cat has nine lives, but needs only one.'"
Use: Adds a companion to the player's companion collection.
"Favored pet of the Defias pirates, this colorful bird is handy for remembering passwords, grocery lists, and cracker recipes."
Use: Adds a companion to the player's companion collection.
"The jungle trolls train these birds to mimic calls for help in order to lure unsuspecting travelers into traps."
Use: Adds a companion to the player's companion collection.
"Once bred and raised by the green dragon Itharius, this unique breed of dragon has settled in the jungles of Feralas."
Use: Adds a companion to the player's companion collection.
"Hailing from the Wetlands, this young dragon is just learning how to hunt, breathe fire, and go on cute destructive rampages."
Use: Brings a dead player back to life with 15% of their health and mana.  Cannot be used when in combat.
Use: Teaches you how to make Powerful Smelling Salts.
Use: Brings a dead player back to life with 15% of their health and mana.  Cannot be used when in combat.
Requires Deeprock Salt (4), Essence of Fire (2), Larval Acid

Use: Coats a weapon with poison that lasts for 30 minutes.
Each strike has a 20% chance of poisoning the enemy which instantly inflicts 67 to 85 Nature damage.  85 charges.

Use: Coats a weapon with poison that lasts for 30 minutes.

Use: Increases armor by 250 for 1 hour.
Use: Does 50 fire damage to any enemies within a 5 yard radius around the caster every 3 seconds for 15 sec

Use: Coats a weapon with poison that lasts for 30 minutes.
Each strike has a 30% chance of poisoning the enemy for 80 Nature damage over 12 sec.  Stacks up to 5 times on a single target.  90 charges.

Use: Coats a weapon with poison that lasts for 30 minutes.
Each strike has a 30% chance of poisoning the enemy for 108 Nature damage over 12 sec.  Stacks up to 5 times on a single target.  105 charges.
Use: Removes 1 magic, curse, poison or disease effect on you every 5 seconds for 30 seconds.
Use: Increases your resistance to all schools of magic by 50 for 3 min.
"Used by Gnomish Engineers to reinforce their creations"
"Used by Goblin Engineers to power their creations"

Use: Increases resistance to shadow by 10.  If an enemy strikes the imbiber, the attacker has a 30% chance of being inflicted with disease that increases their damage taken by 8 for 3 min.  Lasts for 30 min.
Use: Restores 1 to 1500 health and 1 to 1500 mana.
Use: Shows the location of all nearby undead on the minimap for 1 hour.
Use: Increases spell damage by up to 20 for 30 min.
Use: Gives the imbiber invisibility for 18 sec.
Use: Increases Intellect by 25 for 1 hour.

Use: Coats a weapon with poison that lasts for 30 minutes.
Each strike has a 20% chance of poisoning the enemy, increasing their casting time by 60% for 14 sec.  100 charges.
Use: Increases Agility by 25 for 1 hour.
Use: Gives you a dream vision that lets you explore areas that are too dangerous to explore in person.
Use: Increases your Strength by 25 for 1 hour.
Use: Increases attack power by 265 against demons.  Lasts 5 min.
Use: Shows the location of all nearby demons on the minimap for 1 hour.
Use: Increases spell shadow damage by up to 40 for 1 hour.
"Caked grime obscures the true identity of this object."
Use: Shoots a firework into the air that bursts into a thousand blue stars.
Use: Shoots a firework into the air that bursts into a thousand green stars.
Use: Shoots a firework into the air that bursts into a thousand red stars.

Use: The devices charges over time using your life force and then directs a burst of energy at your opponent.
"Death or Serious Injury may result from use of this device."
Use: Explodes when triggered dealing 450 to 750 Fire damage to all enemies nearby and 375 to 625 damage to you.
Use: Teaches you how to make an Inlaid Mithril Cylinder.  This item is used by Gnomish Engineers.
"Used by Gnomish Engineers to reinforce their creations"
Requires Mithril Bar (5), Gold Bar, Truesilver Bar
Use: Shrinks the target reducing their attack power by 250.  Thats what it usually does anyway.....
Use: Captures the target in a net for 10 sec.  The net has a lot of hooks however and sometimes gets caught in the user's clothing when fired......
Use: A shield of force protects you from the next 500 damage done over the next 10 min. WARNING:  Force Field may overload when struck temporarily removing the wearer from this dimension.
Use: These boots significantly increase your run speed for 20 sec.  WARNING:  Their power supply and gyros do not always function as intended.
Use: Creates a Battle Chicken that will fight for you for 1.50 min or until it is destroyed.
Use: Engage in mental combat with a humanoid target to try and control their mind.  If all works well, you will control the mind of the target for 20 sec .....
Use: Deals 61 to 69 fire damage for 10 sec to all targets in a cone in front of the engineer using the weapon.   That is unless it explodes.....
